creator: squat@squat.no
text:
> This port won't build anymore when PF integration is set. I think it's due to this:

Hi,  
 
I'm sorry about that.
New patch is submitted, you can follow the progress of that patch at:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=169205
 
Will hopefully be back in ports by a few days.
 
-- 
Tor Halvard Furulund
